label: Market Definition
description: Aberdeen defines a market category or concept

label: Competitive Assessment
description: Aberdeen's assessment of a named competitor or competitive product

label: Product Feature
description: A specific capability or technical feature of a named product

label: Market Finding
description: An empirical or analytical finding about the market

label: Analyst Recommendation
description: A strategic recommendation from Aberdeen to enterprise buyers

label: Technology Landscape
description: Characterization of the broader technology environment

label: Analyst Assessment
description: Aberdeen's evaluative judgment about a vendor or product

label: Product Context
description: Contextual details about a product's positioning or presence

label: Organization
description: A company, consortium, or standards body

label: Primary Vendor
description: The vendor whose product is the subject of the study

label: Research Author
description: The organization that authored the study

label: Competitor Referenced
description: A competitor referenced for comparison

label: Technology Partner
description: A vendor whose technology the primary product integrates with

label: Planned Technology Partner
description: Integration planned but not yet available at time of study

label: Platform Vendor Referenced
description: Vendor whose platform is mentioned as supported

label: Active
description: Entity operating independently as of the study date

label: Acquired
description: Entity was acquired by another organization after the study

label: Rebranded
description: Entity underwent a name/brand change

label: Obsolete
description: Product/technology discontinued, no active maintenance

label: Evolved
description: Technology transformed into or replaced by a named successor

label: Active
description: Technology still in mainstream active use as of 2026

label: Superseded
description: Technology replaced by alternative approaches; original largely unused

label: Active (Niche)
description: Technology still actively used but in niche or legacy contexts

label: Product Profile
description: In-depth evaluation of a specific vendor product

label: Groupware & Internet Collaboration
description: Collaborative software, workflow, and Internet-enabled business communication

label: Industry Analysis
description: Analysis of market dynamics and industry trends

label: Competitive Profiling
description: Structured comparison of competing products or vendors

label: Field Research
description: Primary research with enterprise customers or end-users
